name: Mirror of Life Trapping
description: When this 4-foot-tall, 2-foot-wide mirror is viewed indirectly, its surface shows faint images of creatures. The mirror weighs 50 pounds, and it has AC 11, HP 10, Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage, and Vulnerability to Bludgeoning damage. It shatters and is destroyed when reduced to 0 Hit Points.

activation.requirement: Hanging on vertical surface, you within 5 feet
activation.duration: Until Magic action to repeat command word to deactivate

trapping.trigger: Creature other than you sees reflection in activated mirror within 30 feet
trapping.on_failed_save: Creature trapped with anything wearing or carrying in one of 12 extradimensional cells
trapping.advantage: Creature knowing mirror's nature has Advantage

cell_properties.environment: Infinite expanse filled with thick fog (visibility 10 feet)
cell_properties.sustenance: Don't need to eat, drink, or sleep
cell_properties.escape: Using magic permitting planar travel only, otherwise confined

capacity.overflow: Trapping new creature when full releases one trapped creature at random
capacity.release_location: Unoccupied space within sight of mirror, facing away

communication.effect: Name creature trapped or call out cell number; creature appears as image and you can communicate

freedom.action: Magic action with second command word within 5 feet
freedom.effect: Free one creature, appears with possessions in nearest unoccupied space, facing away

properties.shattered_effect: All contained creatures freed in unoccupied spaces near mirror

extradimensional_interaction.effect: Placing mirror inside Bag of Holding, Portable Hole, or similar instantly destroys both items
extradimensional_interaction.gate_effect: Opens one-way gate to Astral Plane at placement location
extradimensional_interaction.gate_danger: Creatures within 10 feet not behind Total Cover sucked through to random Astral location
